description: A resolver document for multi-context design tokens (theming, breakpoints, accessibility modes). Follows the DTCG Resolver 2025.10 specification. Describes how token sets and contextual modifiers combine to produce resolved token values for a given input.

main.description: A resolver document that declares token sets and contextual modifiers, with a resolution order that determines how they compose. Given an input (e.g. {theme: 'dark', size: 'compact'}), a resolver produces a flat, contextually-appropriate token set.

$schema.description: Optional URL of a JSON Schema for this resolver document.

name.description: Short human-readable name for this resolver document.

version.description: Resolver format version. Must be '2025.10' per DTCG Resolver spec.

description.description: Human-readable description of this resolver's purpose.

$extensions.description: Vendor-specific extension data. Keys should use reverse-domain notation.

$defs.description: JSON Schema $defs for bundling inline token references. Tools may ignore this key.

sets.description: Named sets of design token sources. Keys are set names; values are set definitions with a 'sources' array and optional 'description' and '$extensions'.

modifiers.description: Named modifiers for contextual token overrides. Keys are modifier names; values have a 'contexts' map (string to token sources array), optional 'description', optional 'default', and optional '$extensions'.

resolutionOrder.description: Ordered list of sets and modifiers that determines the resolution cascade. Later items override earlier ones on conflict. Each entry is a reference object ({$ref: string}) or an inline definition ({name, type: 'set'|'modifier', ...}).
